name: favicon
title: Favicon
description: The Enjab favicon. REQUIRED in every Enjab project, no exceptions. Drops into the Next.js app dir.

files.content:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 64 64" width="64" height="64">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="enjab" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#057C8B"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#1B3766"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="64" height="64" rx="16" fill="url(#enjab)"/>
  <text x="32" y="34" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
        font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="40" font-weight="700" fill="#ffffff">E</text>
</svg>
